allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; const keys = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('date'\) || k.includes\('picker'\) || k.includes\('community'\)\); console.log\(keys.length ? keys : 'none'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('expo'\)\).slice\(0,10\)\);")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/index.bundle?platform=web&dev=true&minify=false" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; "bundle OK, length: " + $r.RawContentLength } catch { $body = $_.ErrorDetails.Message; if \(-not $body\) { $body = $_.Exception.Message }; $body.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(1500, $body.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/node_modules/expo-router/entry.bundle?platform=web&dev=true&minify=false&lazy=true" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 110; "bundle OK, length: " + $r.RawContentLength } catch { $body = $_.ErrorDetails.Message; if \(-not $body\) { $body = $_.Exception.Message }; $body.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2000, $body.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/node_modules/expo-router/entry.bundle?platform=web&dev=true&minify=false&lazy=true" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 110 | Out-Null } catch { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $body.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2500, $body.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/node_modules/expo-router/entry.bundle?platform=web&dev=true&minify=false&lazy=true" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 110; "bundle OK" } catch { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); \($body | ConvertFrom-Json\).message.Substring\(0, 300\) })

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>$null; if \($?\) { "tsc clean" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/node_modules/expo-router/entry.bundle?platform=web&dev=true&minify=false&lazy=true" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 110; "bundle OK" } catch { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); \($body | ConvertFrom-Json\).message.Substring\(0, 400\) })

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 10; if \($?\) { "---" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/node_modules/expo-router/entry.bundle?platform=web&dev=true&minify=false&lazy=true" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 110; "bundle OK" } catch { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); \($body | ConvertFrom-Json\).message.Substring\(0, 400\) })
